items.name: Iran-backed actors (multiple groups)
items.targets: Stryker (MedTech), U.S. critical infrastructure, Israel, Middle East operations - wiper attacks and psychological warfare campaigns including fake shelter danger calls
items.ttps: T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact/Wiper), T1566 (Phishing), T1498 (Network DoS), T1589 (Gather Victim Identity Information), GPS jamming and mapping disruption

items.name: ShinyHunters
items.targets: Hundreds of Salesforce customers in mass data theft campaign targeting Salesforce Experience Cloud
items.ttps: T1213 (Data from Information Repositories), T1567 (Exfiltration Over Web Service), Modified AuraInspector tool exploitation

items.name: Lazarus (North Korean APT)
items.targets: AllSecure CEO via fake LinkedIn interview, developers through supply chain attacks
items.ttps: T1566.001 (Spearphishing Attachment), T1204 (User Execution), T1195 (Supply Chain Compromise), Social engineering via professional networking

items.name: APT28 (Fancy Bear/Russian GRU)
items.targets: Ukrainian forces in long-term espionage operations, Signal and WhatsApp accounts
items.ttps: T1566 (Phishing), T1659 (Content Injection), T1583 (Acquire Infrastructure), Advanced malware toolkit, cyber-espionage operations

items.name: Chinese Nexus Actors
items.targets: Qatar amid Iranian conflict, using PlugX malware with Middle East conflict lures
items.ttps: T1566.001 (Spearphishing Attachment), T1204 (User Execution), PlugX deployment, geopolitical targeting

items.name: MuddyWater (Iranian APT)
items.ttps: T1566 (Phishing), T1059 (Command and Scripting Interpreter), Dindoor malware deployment

items.name: Akira Ransomware
items.ttps: T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact), T1490 (Inhibit System Recovery), T1567 (Exfiltration)

items.name: Qilin Ransomware
items.ttps: T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact), T1490 (Inhibit System Recovery), T1567 (Exfiltration), critical infrastructure targeting

items.name: Clop Ransomware
items.ttps: T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact), T1567 (Exfiltration), T1490 (Inhibit System Recovery)

items.name: Everest Ransomware
items.ttps: T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact), T1567 (Exfiltration), T1490 (Inhibit System Recovery)

items.name: BeatBanker Android Trojan
items.targets: Mobile users via phishing, deploying crypto miner and RAT
items.ttps: T1566.002 (Spearphishing Link), T1496 (Resource Hijacking), T1219 (Remote Access Software), dual-mode Android malware

items.name: GhostClaw/GhostLoader
items.targets: Developers via fake OpenClaw npm package
items.ttps: T1195.002 (Compromise Software Supply Chain), T1036 (Masquerading), malicious npm package distribution

items.name: A0Backdoor operators
items.targets: Organizations via Teams phishing and signed malware masquerading as Zoom/Teams apps
items.ttps: T1566.001 (Spearphishing Attachment), T1036.005 (Match Legitimate Name or Location), T1553.002 (Code Signing), RMM backdoor deployment

items.name: Unnamed threat actor
items.targets: Viking Line Ferries - full passenger database and payment data leaked
items.ttps: T1530 (Data from Cloud Storage), T1567 (Exfiltration), payment card data theft

items.name: Unnamed threat actor
items.targets: South Korean Government Server with root access and lateral movement to 42 internal hosts for sale
items.ttps: T1078 (Valid Accounts), T1570 (Lateral Tool Transfer), T1210 (Exploitation of Remote Services), government network compromise

canada_landscape.summary: Canada was referenced in multiple threat intelligence contexts over the past 48 hours. Specific incidents include alleged data listings involving Canadian data and hacktivist activity timelines mentioning Canada in the context of Iran-Israel-US cyber warfare. A hacker allegedly abusing .arpa domain for phishing was identified as Canadian.
canada_landscape.retailers: None identified - no specific incidents affecting Canadian Tire, SportChek, Mark's, or other Canadian retail chains reported in the last 48 hours.
canada_landscape.financial: None identified - no specific incidents affecting major Canadian financial institutions (CIBC, RBC, TD Bank, Scotiabank, BMO) reported in the last 48 hours.
